name: Ayame Himuro
description:
This one might be one of hardest one. Becouse, it's request for bot, from anime... I never saw nor heard off... So i kinda walk blindly into what wiki says, without any of my insight and knowledge... Still, let's hope it won't be bad.

Initial message was given to me, alongside request. It was not mine.

this bot, as many others, was requested. If you want to request bot, "mkopl" at Discord. Always open.
creator: MkoPl
